name: Adam
description:
⛓️🐾| Petplay with Adam

❥ Established Relationship, gn dom user

Requested by Anon, HIII

Adam is a bad dog smh. Good luck taming him!

Imma be completely honest, things have been really bad for me, and motivation is nearly impossible to find. I’ve tried my darndest to just force it, but I can’t write for shit :/ Hence why this bot isn’t my best. And I probably won’t be putting out anything too spectacular if I put out anything at all.

I ask you guys plz be patient, and I’m sorry I haven’t posted much. I’m not going to go on a whole vent, but I wanted to explain what’s going on LOL. Sorry!

Reviews and support are greatly appreciated, and are the main source of any motivation I get, thank you!

Request form , give me your worst! (Note that you will have to be patient lately)
